summary: The diff implements redesigns for StoriesStrip, PostCard, BottomNav, HomePage, LandingPage, and ProfilePage. Most requirements are substantially addressed, but REQ-15's post grid and edit profile button have partial gaps, and REQ-16's active tab indicator adds an extra dot element alongside the fill highlight.

missing_requirements.requirement: Post grid is masonry or 2-column asymmetric layout instead of a uniform 3-column grid
missing_requirements.reason: The ProfilePage diff does not show masonry or 2-column asymmetric grid classes in the visible portion. The file is truncated but no evidence of such layout is present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Edit profile button spans full width and uses gradient styling as an outlined button
missing_requirements.reason: The AC specifies a full-width outlined button styled with the app's gradient theme, but the implementation uses a solid gradient-primary filled button rather than an outlined/border gradient style.

missing_requirements.requirement: Active tab shows a filled highlight background rather than an underline or icon color change
missing_requirements.reason: The BottomNav uses bg-primary/15 as a filled highlight but also adds an active dot indicator span at the bottom of the icon, which resembles an underline dot pattern alongside the fill, partially conflicting with the AC.

hallucinated_features.description: Active dot indicator added below the icon for the active tab in BottomNav
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies a filled background highlight instead of an underline. An additional small gradient dot below the icon was added without being requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Author initial badge overlay on story card thumbnails in StoriesStrip
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest only requests a username label below the card and a distinct unseen indicator. An author initial badge overlaid on the thumbnail was not requested.
